creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
These workarounds do not work on any supported system and only clutter
the ports.  Not only that, but they prevent removal of expired ports.
If you do not have any valid reason to leave this in, please remove
this.  I will remove the port it depends upon at the latest this
weekend, breaking your ports.

-erwin

-- 
Erwin Lansing                                     http://droso.org
Security is like an onion.          (o_ _o)
It's made up of several layers   \\\_\   /_///
And it makes you cry.            <____) (____>    erwin@lansing.dk
